name: Klingon Diplomatic Greeting Drafting
body:
# Klingon Diplomatic Greeting Drafting
## Human *2369-04-14T10:00:00.000000+00:00* Look up the Klingon greeting "nuqneH" and propose a respectful opening line for a diplomatic dispatch to Chancellor K'mpec.
## Assistant *2369-04-14T10:01:00.000000+00:00* For a dispatch to Chancellor K'mpec, open with "qaleghneS, Chancellor — nuqneH?" The honorific softens the bluntness; together they read as warm-but-direct, which Klingons respect.
## Human *2369-04-14T10:02:00.000000+00:00* Perfect. Make it so.
